---
title: "TikTok"
subtitle: "Platform Evaluation Report"
ugc_answers_file: "data/2025/regional/EU/tk/ugc.yml"
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import sys
from pathlib import Path

project_root = Path.cwd()
while not (project_root / 'utils').exists() and project_root != project_root.parent:
    project_root = project_root.parent
if str(project_root) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(project_root))

from utils.scoring import calculate_platform_score
from utils.quarto_helpers import generate_summary_table

results_ugc = calculate_platform_score(
    year='2025',
    question_type='ugc',
    answers_file="data/2025/regional/EU/tk/ugc.yml"
)

```

**Region:** `{python} results_ugc['metadata'].get('region_code', 'N/A')`

**User-generated transparency score:** `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_score']:.0f}"` / `{python} f"{results_ugc['total_max']:.0f}"` (`{python} f"{results_ugc['total_percentage']:.0f}"`%)

**Advertising transparency score:** Not available

## User-Generated Content

```{python}
#| label: ugc-summary-table
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

generate_summary_table(results_ugc)
```

## Advertising

Not available.
